filesystem.description: Read/write/move/delete files within the AI Employee vault

communications.description: External comms: send_email (SMTP), post_to_linkedin, send_whatsapp_message, log_to_vault

social_media.description: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X: post content, read insights, get mentions, social summary

slack.description: Slack: send messages, read channels, notify team
